title: schnella rutilans
side_effects: Schnella rutilans can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe nausea and diarrhea, as well as causing rapid heartbeat and palpitations in individuals who are sensitive to its alkaloid properties. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to hallucinations and disorientation, particularly in those with pre-existing mental health conditions. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause damage to the liver and kidneys, and may increase the risk of seizures in individuals with a history of epilepsy. Furthermore, improper use of schnella rutilans can lead to an imbalance of electrolytes in the body, resulting in muscle weakness and fatigue.
